task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Magento admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento admin dashboard is visible in the browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the edit page for 'Business Laptop Pro'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The product edit page is open, with 'Business Laptop Pro' or SKU 'LAPTOP-001' visible in the page header or product detail input fields.

task_completion.description: Agent expanded the Design section on the product edit page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Design' accordion/section is expanded on the product page, revealing layout configuration options.

task_completion.description: Agent set the product layout to '1 column'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Layout' dropdown within the Design section is explicitly set to '1 column'.

task_completion.description: Agent set the product options block to 'Product Info Column'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Display Product Options In' dropdown within the Design section is explicitly set to 'Product Info Column'.
A green success message (e.g., 'You saved the product.') is visible at the top of the product edit page.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and Magento Admin UI, not terminal commands, curl requests, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent modified the specific product, not the global theme.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are made exclusively on the Catalog > Products > Edit Product page, and there is no evidence of the agent navigating to Content > Design > Configuration to alter global layouts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the actual Magento admin panel with standard navigation menus and UI elements, not a text editor or mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target product is 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001). The layout must be set to '1 column' (internal attribute code: 1column). The product options container must be set to 'Product Info Column' (internal attribute code: container1). These settings are found under the 'Design' section of the individual product edit page in Magento 2. The agent must not change global theme settings.
